basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Research Associate (Agronomy) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Research Associate (Agronomy) Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: Not exceeding 35 years for men and 40 years for women.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. (Agronomy), M.Sc. (Ag) Agronomy with NET qualification
qualification.details: Research Associate (Agronomy): Ph.D. (Agronomy) OR M.Sc. (Ag) (Agronomy with NET qualified) with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree having first division or equivalent overall grade point average with at least 3 years of respective teaching/research experience. Published one research paper in SCI/NAAS rated (≥4.0) journal. All degrees from ICAR accredited University/Colleges.

salary_details.details: Rs. 67,000/- + HRA per month (for Ph.D. holders) Rs. 61,000/- + HRA per month (for M.Sc. Ag holders)

all_official_links.label: Download ANGRAU Research Associate (Agronomy) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 17 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Agronomy or an M.Sc. (Ag) in Agronomy with NET qualification, along with specific experience and publication requirements as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for male candidates is 35 years, and for female candidates, it is 40 years. The overall maximum age is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 67,000/- + HRA per month for Ph.D. holders and Rs. 61,000/- + HRA per month for M.Sc. Ag holders.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Associate (Agronomy) announced by ANGRAU.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity. The specific terms and duration of the contract will be detailed in the official recruitment notification.
